name: Chang'e 5
fact: First lunar sample return in 44 years — ending a gap since Luna 24 (1976). Returned 1.731 kg from a geologically young region (2 billion years old vs 3–4 billion for Apollo samples). Rewrote our model of lunar volcanism: the Moon was geologically active much more recently than thought.
capability: Modern robotic sample return architecture — direct precursor to Mars Sample Return's lander/ascent vehicle/orbiter chain.
